name_cn:
Chane1 24S Pearl mini CF AS4861
Pearls paired with gold chains complement each other. The double-bead design is more novel and unique, featuring a small double-C logo. A simple, elegant, and exquisite feel. The adjustable chain suits any height. Simply wonderful.Size: 13×20.5×6.5cm
